payload.answer: I can’t save an entire transcript as a durable memory. Please choose a more specific repair option, such as extracting concise durable facts, saving a brief summary, or not saving anything.
repair_options: Extract only durable, user-relevant facts from the transcript as separate candidate memories for review.
Create a short, non-transcript conversation summary candidate that omits verbatim bulk content.
Ask the user which specific details from the transcript should be remembered.
Do not save the transcript or any summary from it.
If there are multiple topics, split them into separate candidate memory options instead of one large transcript card.
